Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Spear of Tharlos]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — The Spear of Tharlos is an item belonging to Bliss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The Spear of Tharlos was carved from the corpse of Tharlos, the Formless Legion.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — The Spear of Tharlos is made of ancient yellowed bone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — The Spear of Tharlos can twist of its own accord, bending physical mass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Tharlos' spear was contorting and writhing in the pocket of Bliss's coat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Bliss's Spear of Tharlos was thrown during a clash between Teach and Jerri in the Emperor's chambers.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Spear of Tharlos can be sensed through mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Spear of Tharlos is an ancient Elder artifact that can transform things thrown at it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Spear of Tharlos is an Elder weapon.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Spear of Tharlos was made by the Regents from a bone taken from the Great Elder of Chaos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Spear of Tharlos exhibits life-like qualities such as throbbing like a heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Spear of Tharlos is at Calder's throat when he wakes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Spear of Tharlos' Intent wants things to change constantly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Bliss keeps the Spear of Tharlos in an Intent-sealing harness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Spear of Tharlos can neutralize lethal poison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — The Spear of Tharlos turned into a muskrat.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Bliss of the Blackwatch has a Spear of Tharlos.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
